reviews.review_title: All the bones for a great game
reviews.review_description:
Very impressed by the animations and gameplay mechanics, but the one thing missing seems to be a tutorial for those people who have never played Yahtzee before. I could always look online for how to play but it would be better to be able to read the rules in game.

It might be an idea to include (or even default to) a mode where the bunny girls are more appropriately dressed for non adult audience as the current attire may limit your market a little.

Perhaps adding hand tracking at some stage.

Well done and hopefully the game evolves a little over time

developer_response.body: Hi grahamjupp! Glad to see such thoughtful review from you! We think all of your suggestions are great and we will take them into serious consideration. Our art directors are working on the new scenes now, may change the bunny girls quickly.  Also for the starters of Yahtzee, we will have discuss with our designers to add that.  Thanks so much for your encouragement to our games. If you are willing to talk more about the game, you could join our Discord community :https://discord.com/invite/Jmpf4sRXeX

reviews.review_title: amazing reason not to take the vaccine

developer_response.body: Hi drewvigil, thank you so much for your affirmation and encouragement. To improve our game for you, we regularly bring updates to the store with improvements for both speed and reliability. If you enjoy Yahtzee, would you mind go to our Discord server and meet people to play against or give us more suggestions. Go to our Discord server: https://discord.yahtzeevr.com

reviews.review_description:
Horribly glitchy and buggy. It is only ok if there were no glitches too. This game is nothing special.

But if you still want it, use this link for 25% off:
https://www.oculus.com/appreferrals/Lu_Million/4678365515608296/?utm_source=2
Why aren't there more ratings on here?? This is Awesome, Multi-player and Free!! A lil twist to black Jack!

developer_response.body: Hi DuvalDiva, thank you so much for such great compliment for our game! We will continously polish our game with speed and reliability. If you enjoy Yahtzee, would you mind go to our Discord server and meet people to play against or give us more suggestions. Go to our Discord server: https://discord.yahtzeevr.com

reviews.review_description: I wanted to love this gave but it just wouldn't play right.

developer_response.body:
Hi Ferriwolf, 
Thank you for your feedback. Our dev team is checking the issue now and I'll let you know asap the results are back. 

Meanwhile, to better help the dev team understand this problem would you care to tell us a bit more about it? Is is a bug or the game was unable to load? or something else? We'd appreciate your reply.

Best Regards,
Suplife Team
